title: Tranquil Park Maleny
description: Modest rooms & apartments in a casual hotel offering a beer garden, a restaurant/bar & free parking.
address: 483 Mountain View Rd, Maleny QLD 4552, Australia
hotelDescription:
Offering views of the Glass House Mountains, this unassuming hotel is 2 km from Maleny Botanic Gardens and Bird World, and 3 km from walking paths in Mary Cairncross Scenic Reserve.
 Simple rooms offer satellite TV, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. The 1- to 3-bedroom apartments add kitchens. Some have separate living areas.
 Parking is complimentary. Other amenities consist of a laid-back restaurant/bar, a beer garden, and meeting and event space. Continental breakfast is available.

title: Maleny Terrace Cottages
description: Relaxed rooms & suites with balconies in a relaxed hotel offering an outdoor pool & a garden.
address: 1 Panorama Pl, Maleny QLD 4552, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set in lush gardens, this laid-back hotel off Route 23 is 2 km from the Mary Cairncross Scenic Reserve, and 7 km from the Maleny Botanic Gardens and Bird World.
 The relaxed rooms come with furnished balconies, polished wood floors and flat-screen TVs, in addition to minifridges, tea and coffeemaking facilities, and whirlpool tubs. Suites add kitchenettes and living rooms. All include complimentary Wi-Fi.
 There's an outdoor pool and a garden.
